MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
William O. Stein, Esq. of Epstein Becker Green, T:310.556.8861, for defendant/moving party;
Stephen C. Baker, Esq. of Diamond Baker Mitchell, LLP, T:530.272.9977, ext 202, for plaintiff/opposing party.
